titleStmt.title: SII 8.571: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 571. (A.R. No. 266 of 1903). ON THE SAME BASE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tirumakaḷpolap perunilaccelviyūm taṉakkey Urimai pūṇṭamai maṉakkoḷak kāntaḷūrcālai kala maṟuttaruḷi veṅkaināṭuṅ kaṅkapāṭiyū nuḷampapāṭiyūn taṭikaipāṭiyūṅ kuṭamalaināṭuṅ kollamuṅ kaliṅkamum Eṇṭicai pukaḻtara Īḻamaṇṭalamum Iraṭṭapāṭi yeḻaraiyilakkamum tiṇṭiṟal veṉṟit taṇṭāṟ koṇṭu taṉṉeḻil myāṇṭey ceḻiyarait tecukoḷ śrī koi
rājarājakecaripaṉmarākiya śrīirājarā[ja*]de varkku yāṇṭu 2 10 4Āvatu keraḷāntakavaḷannā ṭ ṭuṟaiyūrkkūṟṟattu tirupparāyttuṟai ma hāde varkku kṣatriyaśikhā- maṇivaḷanāṭṭup paṭṭiṉakkūṟṟattu brahma teyam kaṭampaṉūr moci Araiyaṉ pārānna terumāṉ taṉ poṉṉiṭṭu Aḷavāna nilaṉ paṉaṅkāṭṭu nni lattil koṉaṭivayakkal kāverikulai Aṭaitta nilaṉ I Innilaṉ Araiyiṉāl Āṇṭuvarai Aṭṭa
Innellu 6 10- ḷa Innellu Aṟupatiṉkalattiṉāl cellum paṭimāṟṟu niccalpaṭi cārttiyaruḷum tāmaraippūviṉ tiruppaḷḷittāmam santitoṟum Irupatāka muṉṟu san=ti kkum Aṟupatu tāmaraippūt tiruppaḷḷittāmam paṟittu kkuṇarvāṉ Oruvaṉukku nicatam nellu cūlakkālāl pattuṉāḻiyāka nellu muppatu ṉāḻi ḻañciṉukku nellu Aiṅkalamum mācimakat tiruviḻāvil nā
lānāḷ makaiyiratti ṉāṉṟu nāṟkala variciyāṟ peruntiruvamutu ceytaruḷavum Itaṟkuveṇṭum pala vicataṅkaḷumāka Āṇṭuvarai nel patiṉaiṅ kalaṉe tūṇippatakkum Innilattukku nilakkaṭaṉ nellu Irukalamum Āka Arumoḻitevavayakkalāl Āṇṭuvarai nellu ṉāl veṭṭuvittom tirupparāyttuṟai ma hāde var kaṉ
mikaḷom . Itu panmā heśvara rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 8.571 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
